data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Netio device.
data_description.password: The password of the device account.
data_description.port: The port of the JSON API web server on the device.
data_description.ssl: Connect to the device using HTTPS.
data_description.username: The username of a device account with read-write access to the JSON API.
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify the SSL certificate of the device when using HTTPS.

deprecated_yaml.description:
Configuring the Netio switch platform using YAML is being removed. The integration now connects to your device using the JSON API, which requires a new setup.

To set up your device:

1. Open the web interface of your Netio device and enable the **JSON API** protocol (**Settings** > **M2M API Protocols** > **JSON API**), creating an account with read-write access.
2. [Add the Netio integration]({url}) and enter the connection details, using the JSON API account credentials.
3. Remove the `netio` switch platform configuration from your `configuration.yaml` file and restart Home Assistant.

Afterwards, your device outputs are available as switch entities again.
deprecated_yaml.title: The Netio YAML configuration is being removed
